title: Estimated Time for Completion
content:
Estimated Time for Completion
The estimated time to complete this activity is 5 minutes.

Completion
The naming convention is ENG101_wk#_warm_up_firstintiallastname_date—for example, ENG101_wk3_warm_up_jsmith_mmddyyyy.
Submit the Week 3 Weekly Writing Warm-Up by the end of the week. See the video below to review the process.



After you submit your assignment, click Next to complete the Week 3 Discussion.


Warm-up Rubric

Warm-up Rubric
Criteria Ratings Pts
This criterion is linked to a Learning OutcomeEvaluation
Weekly Writing Warmup assessment criteria.
100 pts
Full Credit
Submission reflects completion of the guidelines and prompts outlined in the instructions and the required time spent writing.
50 pts
Partial Credit
Submission reflects on at least half of the guidelines and prompts outlined in the instructions and the required time spent writing.
0 pts
No Credit
context: From document: Weeks 1 - 6 Canvas Data Dump — chunk 86 (chunk 86/188)
